ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "returns" REAL /* Calculated returns for the instrument on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the market data was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticker symbol */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, index, ETF) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "market_segment_id" INTEGER /* Market segment to which the instrument belongs */,
  "benchmark_index_id" INTEGER /* Benchmark index against which the instrument is compared */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the instrument */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data entry */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the instrument over a specified period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio calculated from the instrument's returns */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the instrument calculated against a benchmark */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the instrument, which measures its volatility relative to the market */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the instrument over the specified period */,
  "calmar_ratio" REAL /* Calmar ratio, which is the ratio of the average annual return to the maximum drawdown */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period over which the metrics are calculated (e.g., 1 month, 1 year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full content of the analyst report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report for quick reference */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Market segment to which the report pertains */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Benchmark index used in the report */,
  "trading_strategy" TEXT /* Trading strategy discussed in the report */,
  "risk_assessment" TEXT /* Summary of the risk assessment for the strategies discussed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES market_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES benchmark_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the market segment (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market segment */,
  "parent_segment_id" INTEGER /* Parent segment to which the market segment belongs (for hierarchical segmentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_segments_parent_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_segment_id") REFERENCES market_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark index */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the benchmark index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark index */,
  "index_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benchmark index (e.g., S&P, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry the benchmark index represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for which the alert is set */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., 'Above', 'Below') */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Market segment to which the alert applies */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Benchmark index to which the alert is related */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES benchmark_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES market_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., 'Buy', 'Sell') */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit, stop) */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Exact time the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Market segment to which the news article pertains */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Benchmark index mentioned in the news */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES benchmark_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES market_segments ("segment_id")
)
